preferred_translation: with putting together as condition, knowing
definition: Second forward-link line in the dependent-arising sequence.
notes: Use this record for the whole line when the chain itself is being translated. It keeps the phrase within the repository's process-focused handling of saṅkhārā and conditioned handling of viññāṇa. The OSF glossary supports this coordinated inheritance from saṅkhārā and viññāṇa in the formula line.

context_rules.rendering: with putting together as condition, knowing

context_rules.context: When a controlled doctrinal alternate for viññāṇa is already in use
context_rules.rendering: with putting together as condition, consciousness
context_rules.notes: Use only when the surrounding translation is already using that controlled alternate.

example_phrases.translation: with putting together as condition, knowing

authority_basis.scope: Supports coordinated inheritance from saṅkhārā and viññāṇa in the formula line.

translation_policy.default_scope: Use as the standard second line of the forward chain.
translation_policy.when_not_to_apply: Do not detach the line from the repository's conditioned-process handling of viññāṇa.
translation_policy.drift_risk: Prevents the line from slipping into witness-consciousness or abstract formation language.
